features: SILKY SMOOTH SKIN: ELYSIUM SPA Mesh Exfoliating Bath & Shower Sponges, dual textured to cleanse and exfoliate leaving silky smooth skin. Use in the bath or shower at home or in the gym.
CLEAN & FRESH: ELYSIUM SPA Mesh Exfoliating Bath & Shower Sponges, create a luxurious rich lather when used with soap or shower gel. Enjoy a gentle, exfoliating massage as you bathe or shower.

LOOFAH BODY PUFF BALL: ELYSIUM SPA Mesh Exfoliating Bath & Shower Sponges, supplied in layers to create an easy to hold and use ball. After use rinse, hang to air dry in the bathroom or peg the loop to an airer or washing line to dry

HOW TO USE: ELYSIUM SPA Mesh Exfoliating Bath & Shower Sponges, ready to use, wet with warm water, apply soap or shower gel and gently massgae in circular motions to gently exfoliate, leaving skin feeling clean and soft
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Assorted Colour 4 Pack ELYSIUM SPA Mesh Exfoliating & Cleansing Sponge with Hanging Loop for storage and drying. Colours; Lilac, Silver Grey, Pink, Light Aqua
description: Product Description ELYSIUM SPA Mesh Exfoliating Bath & Shower Sponges, dual textured to cleanse and exfoliate leaving silky smooth skin. Use in the bath or shower at home or in the gym. ELYSIUM SPA Mesh Exfoliating Bath & Shower Sponges, supplied in layers to create an easy to hold and use ball. After use rinse, hang to air dry in the bathroom or peg the loop to an airer or washing line to dry. Ready to use, wet with warm water, apply soap or shower gel and gently massgae in circular motions to gently exfoliate, leaving skin feeling clean and soft.
